message:
test(spsc,bocpd): expand proptest coverage for ring buffer and BOCPD (wa-1u90p.7.1)

proptest_spsc_ring_buffer: 2 → 15 properties (capacity invariants, close
semantics, FIFO ordering, depth tracking, idempotency).
proptest_bocpd: 6 → 22 tests (serde roundtrips for all 6 serializable types,
warmup no-detection, observation count tracking, probability bounds, manager
register/unregister/auto-registration, total_change_points monotonicity).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
